name: Lime Tempeh
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tempeh in half shortways, then diagonally to create 4 triangles.
2. In a bowl, mix together the lime juice, light soy sauce, white wine, chopped garlic, coarse cumin, and 2 Tbsp cumin to form a marinade.
3. Place the marinated tempeh in the bowl and allow it to marinate for several hours.
4. After marinating, remove the tempeh from the marinade, reserving most of the marinade in the bottom of the roasting dish.
5. Broil the tempeh for about 5 minutes on each side until golden brown.
